rule: Capture only compact remediation-oriented signals before deciding whether to fix, route, remember, review, or dismiss them.

validation_failure_classes.signal_rule: The failing check clearly identifies invalid user content or an ordinary implementation bug.
validation_failure_classes.route: fix the content or code directly; do not treat it as product/interface work by default

validation_failure_classes.signal_rule: The failure is caused by missing tools, local environment state, network state, or dependency setup.
validation_failure_classes.route: repair or document setup only when the failure repeats across environments

validation_failure_classes.signal_rule: Otherwise straightforward work repeatedly fails because the package interface asks agents to hand-author, guess, rerun, or repair shape.
validation_failure_classes.route: prefer correct-by-design package surfaces before adding more validation text

validation_failure_classes.signal_rule: The failure is mainly about selecting, sequencing, or re-entering proof rather than fixing domain behavior.
validation_failure_classes.route: tighten proof selection, recovery guidance, or a lifecycle command

validation_remedy_order: repair environment/setup failures only when they are real blockers
for repeated interface-design failures, prefer scaffold, writer helper, alias, lifecycle command, command, or agent aid before adding more validation prose
promote to planning or issue follow-up only when the owner and proof path are clear

correct_by_design_review.rule: Validation should confirm correct construction, not teach agents how to construct the artifact or workflow after failure.
ask_when: adding or materially changing package-owned command, report, planning, Memory, setup, or lifecycle surfaces
adding or materially changing schema-backed artifacts or generated adapters
closing a self-improvement slice that touched package operating surfaces
questions: Does the structure invite the right action before validation runs?
Can the interface make the wrong action impossible or unlikely?
Can a scaffold, writer helper, alias, lifecycle command, compact route, or agent aid construct the correct shape?
Can validation remain confirmatory rather than instructional?
If validation still teaches construction, where is the remedy signal routed?

guardrails: A signal is not a work item until an owner and proof path are chosen.
Do not preserve low-confidence one-off discomfort without a clear owner.
Do not use Memory as active state for signals.
Prefer shrinking or deleting the signal residue after remediation unless it still prevents rediscovery.
